titleStmt.title: SII 20.230: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 230. (B.K. No. 142 of 1935-36.) BANAVĀSI, SIRSI TALUK, NORTH KANARA DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar in the Tirumaladēva temple outside the Madhukēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1290, Kīlaka, Āshāḍha śu. 1, Sunday. The date is irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1368, June 16, which was a Friday.

The inscription states that when Bukkaraāya's subordinate Mādhavāṅka was governing Banāvasi 12000, the latter's servant Aubhaḷanātha (i.e. Ahōbalanātha) effected repairs to the temple of Gōpīnātha, in order to fulfil the desire of his master. Ahōbalanātha also requested the gauḍas and the subjects (praje) of eighteen kaṁpaṇas of Gutti whereupon the latter assembling at Banavāsi, made a gift of land for the benefit of the temple, and entrusted the gift to Bikkidēva, the son (i.e. the disciple) of Lakuḷīśvaradēva.
The king is stated to be ruling from Hastināvati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ
Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāsege tappuva rā
yara gaṁḍa pūrvvapaścimasamudrādhīsvaraṁ śrīvīra bu
kkarāyanu hastināvatipuradalli sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi mādhavāṁkanu banavaseya pannirchchā
siramanāḷuva kāladalu Avara baṁṭa naṁdaurada cau
ḍarasana maga Aubhaḷanāthanu taṁna Oḍeya mādhava
daṁḍanāthaṁge manōrathasiddhiyahaṁthāgi gōpīnāthadē
vara dēvālayavanū jī(ṁ)rnnōddhāravanū māḍi
Ā dēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgavācaṁdrasthā Iyā
gi naḍavaṁtāgi gutiya hadineṁṭu kaṁpaṇada ga
Uḍu prajegaḷige hēḷi banavaseyali kū
ṭava māḍidalli yeḍenāḍiṁge mukhyarappa śrī
madanādiya paṭṭaṇada piriyagrahā
raṁ yelase kupvagaḍeya mahājanaṁgaḷu soraba
da dhar(ṁ)mmagauḍa tavanidhiya boṁmagauḍa kisa
lūra mōcagauḍa koṁḍakaṭe nāḍiṁge mukhyarappa
heccittada boṁmmaṇa bāḷeyahaḷḷiya narasappa nāgarakhaṁḍeya
kke kupaṭūra gōpagauḍa huruḷeya hoṭṭiya tammagau
ḍa nēṟilageya buḷḷappa hiriya jiḍuvaḷigege Uddareya ciṁṁnabo
ppa Avaliya cīkhagauḍa bisuḍagauḍa cikkajiḍuvaḷigege ceṭṭūra
mōliya ta(ṁ)mma kabbūra kēsavadēva haṁneyahaḷige sidhapagauḍa
Ācagauḍa hiriyahaḷigege sirivaṁtiya cikkaṁṇa koggu
veya boṁmaṇna siriŪra muddagauḍa hasuvalatiya dhar(ṁ)mmagauḍa
taḍa gōleya boṁmagauḍa Ayavattaḷigege hiriya kallagauḍa
tegga kallagauḍa Alaviḷiya sātagauḍa kabbunāḷigege mukhyara
ppakaruŪra hoṭṭappa kānasiriŪra kaṁcagauḍa hērūra
sātagauḍa bāḷūra siṁgagauḍa guttihaḷige mukhyarappa paṁ
galūra bīrappa haḷiya siya bommadēvanoḷagāda sama
sta gauḍaprajegaḷuṁ banavāsiyalu kūṭavāgi kuḷḷiddu svasti śrī
jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1290 neya kīlaka saṁvatsarada
Āṣāḍa su 1 Ādivāradalu ha(ṁ)nnihaḷiya nāḍa Oḷage sēra
bārada catussīme Oḷagāgi yidda bhūmiyanū dhā
rāpūrvakavāgi koṭṭu Ā Ūriṁge saluva kuḷavanu ya
ha salisikoṁḍu svasti śrī jayaṁtīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ śrīma
dhukanāthadēvara divyaśrīpādapadmarādhakaruṁ rāyarājagu
ru bhūmaṁḍaḷācāryya sivasamayavārdhivardhanasaracaṁdraca
ṁdrikāprabhāvaruṁ madanamadagarvvaparvvatanirvvāṇapramōdaruṁ
kādaṁbarāyakulācāryarumappa lākuḷīsvaradēvara
kumāra cikkadēva Ayagaḷige yī dhar(ṁ)mmavanu naḍasuvaṁtā
gi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭaru yī dhar(ṁ)mmavanu Āru Obba
ru madhukanāthadēvara dēvasthānakke Ācāryyarādhaṁnvayadēvari
madhukanāthadēvara dharmma māḍida dhar(ṁ)mmavāgi caṁdrārkka
bara naḍesuvaru . yī dhar(ṁ)mmavanu hadineṁṭu
worn out
Digital edition of SII 20.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
